steps.name: install_deps
steps.command: conda run -p /tmp/sure_eval_qwen2_vl_2b_instruct/env python -m pip install torch torchvision transformers accelerate qwen-vl-utils pillow sentencepiece

steps.name: record_lockfiles
steps.command: conda list -p /tmp/sure_eval_qwen2_vl_2b_instruct/env --explicit && conda run -p /tmp/sure_eval_qwen2_vl_2b_instruct/env python -m pip freeze

risks: No CUDA device is visible on the host even though the model hint says requires_gpu=true.
The Hugging Face checkpoint is large enough that CPU-only load/infer may be slow or may fail due to memory pressure.
Sandboxed network is unavailable by default, so package and weight fetching require approved escalation.
